title: Otis Makes Yummy Sounds
synopsis: Baby Otis explores different foods and the delightful sounds they make when he eats them, from crunchy apples to slurpy soup, creating a joyful mealtime adventure full of tasty discoveries.

pages.text: Otis sits in his high chair. Time to eat!

illustration.description: A cheerful Black toddler with curly hair sits in a bright yellow high chair, wearing a colorful bib with fruit patterns. His hands are on the tray, eyes bright with anticipation. The kitchen background shows warm peach walls with simple cabinet outlines. Soft morning light creates a cozy atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Otis, a happy Black toddler, sitting in his high chair ready for mealtime

illustration.description: Otis holds a red apple slice in his small hands, his mouth open mid-bite with a delighted expression. Apple pieces and juice glisten on his tray. The word 'CRUNCH' appears in bold, rounded letters nearby. His grandmother, an elderly Black woman with silver hair, smiles warmly in the background.
illustration.alt: Otis biting into a crunchy apple slice while his grandmother watches

illustration.description: Otis squeezes a soft banana piece between his fingers, yellow mush oozing through. His face shows pure joy and curiosity. The word 'SQUISH' floats above in playful yellow letters. His father, a tall Black man with glasses, chuckles while cleaning up nearby.
illustration.alt: Otis happily squishing a banana while his father watches and cleans

illustration.description: Otis carefully holds a colorful spoon with orange soup, some dripping back into his bowl. His lips are pursed in a slurping motion, eyes focused on his task. Steam rises gently from the bowl. His mother, a Black woman with natural hair in a headwrap, guides his hand supportively.
illustration.alt: Otis learning to eat soup with a spoon while his mother helps guide him

illustration.description: Otis breaks a golden cracker in half, crumbs scattering across his tray. His face lights up with surprise and delight at the snapping sound. The word 'SNAP' appears in crispy brown letters. A Hispanic babysitter with long dark hair sits beside him, offering another cracker.
illustration.alt: Otis breaking crackers with his babysitter offering more

illustration.description: Otis picks up colorful round cereal pieces one by one, cheeks full as he munches contentedly. His bowl shows a few remaining pieces in milk. The word 'MUNCH' bounces above in rainbow colors. His older sister, a young Black girl with braided hair, sits across from him eating her own breakfast.
illustration.alt: Otis munching cereal while his sister eats breakfast across from him

illustration.description: Otis tilts his sippy cup up high, drinking eagerly with both hands gripping the handles. A small dribble runs down his chin. His eyes are closed in concentration. The word 'GULP' appears in cool blue letters. His Asian pediatrician neighbor waves from the kitchen window visible in the background.
illustration.alt: Otis drinking from his sippy cup with his neighbor visible through the window

pages.text: All done! Otis pats his happy belly.

illustration.description: Otis leans back in his high chair, both hands patting his round little belly with a satisfied smile. Food remnants and happy mess cover his tray and bib. His whole family gathers around - parents, grandmother, and sister - all smiling at his mealtime success. Warm golden light fills the scene.
illustration.alt: Satisfied Otis patting his belly while his diverse family smiles proudly around him

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound does the apple make?
questions.explanation: The apple makes a CRUNCH sound when Otis bites it!

questions.question: Who helps Otis eat his soup?
questions.explanation: Otis's mother helps guide his hand while he eats soup with a spoon.

questions.question: What does Otis do when he's all done eating?
questions.explanation: Otis pats his happy belly when he's finished with his meal!
